mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_document_check (document_id, member_id, checked) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{memberId}, #{checked})
mapper.select: SELECT d.document_id, d.announce_id, d.title, d.description, COALESCE(mdc.checked, false) AS checked, a.title AS announce_title, a.reqst_start_date, a.reqst_end_date, a.pub_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document d2 WHERE d2.announce_id = d.announce_id) AS total_docs, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_document_check mdc2 JOIN document d3 ON mdc2.document_id = d3.document_id WHERE d3.announce_id = d.announce_id AND mdc2.member_id = #{memberId} AND mdc2.checked = true) AS checked_docs FROM document d JOIN announce a ON d.announce_id = a.announce_id LEFT JOIN member_document_check mdc ON d.document_id = mdc.document_id AND mdc.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE d.announce_id = #{announceId}

SELECT d.document_id, d.announce_id, d.title, d.description, COALESCE(mdc.checked, false) AS checked, a.title AS announce_title, a.reqst_end_date, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document d2 WHERE d2.announce_id = d.announce_id) AS total_docs, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_document_check mdc2 JOIN document d3 ON mdc2.document_id = d3.document_id WHERE d3.announce_id = d.announce_id AND mdc2.member_id = #{memberId} AND mdc2.checked = true) AS checked_docs FROM document d JOIN announce a ON d.announce_id = a.announce_id LEFT JOIN member_document_check mdc ON d.document_id = mdc.document_id AND mdc.member_id = #{memberId} WHERE a.announce_id IN ( SELECT announce_id FROM member_favorite WHERE member_id = #{memberId} )
